channel.title: It-Career-Playbook on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in It-Career-Playbook on simeononsecurity

item.title: Getting a Job in Information Technology
item.category: "IT job search" , "IT resume" , "IT interview questions" , "entry level IT jobs" , "remote IT jobs" , "IT internships" , "IT salary" , "IT job market"
item.description: How to find, apply for, and land IT jobs — from resume writing and interview prep to entry-level strategies, internships, and remote work.

item.title: Getting Started in Information Technology
item.category: "IT career" , "getting started in IT" , "IT beginner" , "IT career path" , "IT specializations" , "home lab" , "IT training" , "entry level IT"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin an IT career — from understanding the field to building your first home lab and choosing a specialization.

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology career" , "IT certifications" , "CompTIA A+" , "CompTIA Network+" , "systems administration" , "cloud computing" , "DevOps" , "help desk" , "IT job search" , "IT salary" , "IT management" , "IT career path" , "IT training" , "IT skills"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salary expectations, and team leadership.

item.title: IT Certifications, Degrees, and Training
item.category: "IT certifications" , "CompTIA" , "Cisco CCNA" , "cloud certifications" , "AWS certification" , "Microsoft certification" , "IT degree" , "IT bootcamp" , "certification roadmap"
item.description: The complete guide to IT certifications, degrees, and bootcamps. CompTIA, Cisco, Microsoft, cloud certs, and how to build the right credential stack for your career.

item.title: Managing an IT Team
item.category: "IT team management" , "IT manager" , "building IT team" , "IT change management" , "ITSM" , "ITIL" , "outsourcing IT" , "IT director" , "IT leadership"
item.description: How to build, lead, and scale an IT team — team structure, hiring, change management, ITSM practices, and the outsourcing vs. in-house decision.

item.title: Moving Up in Your IT Career
item.category: "IT career advancement" , "IT promotion" , "IT management track" , "technical track" , "IT certifications" , "IT compliance" , "ITIL" , "NIST" , "career growth in IT"
item.description: How to advance from individual contributor to senior engineer or IT management — certifications, the technical vs. management track, and the compliance frameworks every senior IT professional needs to know.
